project.name: AI Healthcare Assistant
project.description: Restructured AI-powered healthcare symptom advisor and clinical wellness chat portal using a strict SOLID layered architecture.

nodes.name: app.py
nodes.summary: FASTAPI controller exposing authentication, diagnostics, history, and wellness chatbot endpoints. Coordinates services and repositories.

nodes.name: config.py
nodes.summary: Centralized config settings loading and validating environment variables (MONGO_URI, SMTP, Gemini API).

nodes.name: schemas.py
nodes.summary: Pydantic request models and schemas for type safety and route parameter validation.

nodes.name: repository.py
nodes.summary: Database repository layer implementing isolated MongoDB queries for users, predictions, and chat logs.

nodes.name: services.py
nodes.summary: Encapsulated business service layer managing OTP creation, SMTP email delivery, and symptom-analysis orchestration.

nodes.name: symptom_engine.py
nodes.summary: Pure rule-based symptom engine matching symptoms with doctor specialties, severity risk levels, and first-care remedies.

nodes.name: harness.py
nodes.summary: Mechanical architecture linter ensuring no config leakage or database imports exist in controllers or services.

nodes.name: App.jsx
nodes.summary: React single-page app containing symptom analysis input, diagnosis dashboard, OpenStreetMap locator, and chatbot widget.

nodes.name: App.css
nodes.summary: CSS styles layout implementing healthcare themes, glassmorphism card templates, and mobile-responsive overlays.

nodes.name: docker-compose.yml
nodes.summary: Docker orchestration coordinating backend containers, Nginx frontend, and local MongoDB database.

nodes.name: AGENTS.md
nodes.summary: Developer agent guide mapping codebase architectural layers, harness checks, and SOLID/DRY rules.

layers.name: Database Repository Layer
layers.description: Direct MongoDB operations isolated from controllers.

layers.name: Domain Services Layer
layers.description: Encapsulates business operations, OTP logic, and diagnostics.

layers.name: Web Controller Layer
layers.description: FatAPI routing controllers mapping endpoints to services.

layers.name: Frontend Application Layer
layers.description: React single page dashboard, styles, and asset layouts.

tour.title: Welcome and Guidelines
tour.description: Read AGENTS.md first to understand the layered boundaries and SOLID guidelines of this repository.

tour.title: Centralized Config
tour.description: Inspect config.py to see how env vars are unified and validated.

tour.title: Data Access Boundary
tour.description: Explore repository.py to understand how MongoDB collections are read/written.

tour.title: Business Flow Logic
tour.description: Review services.py for OTP verification routines, email alerts, and symptom matching coordination.

tour.title: Exposing the APIs
tour.description: Check app.py for endpoint definition mapping requests to response serializers.

tour.title: Client Experience
tour.description: Explore App.jsx to see how the single page React client interacts with the FastAPI servers.
